scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,worker -c cyan,magenta,green "npm run dev --workspace @service-levels/api" "npm run dev --workspace @service-levels/web" "npm run worker:dev --workspace @service-levels/api"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @service-levels/shared && npm run build --workspace @service-levels/api && npm run build --workspace @service-levels/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @service-levels/api && npm run test --workspace @service-levels/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @service-levels/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @service-levels/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @service-levels/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @service-levels/api && npm run lint --workspace @service-levels/web
